selection_rule: select the dominance-indexed engine for generalized component work only if all four outputs retain exact INFEASIBLE status and 57/57/57/95 submodels, and the maximum per-case wall is at most 149.739406183362 seconds (at least 20x projected four-host wall speedup versus the frozen sequential CP-SAT screen)

results.reason: Correctness reproduced exactly, but the 618.446615-second critical path exceeds the preregistered 149.739406-second limit. Case 1 generated 14,648,710 cover configurations and remained essentially unchanged from the formal engine's 621.085 seconds, disproving the sampled diagnosis that occupancy-subset dominance was its governing bottleneck.
